response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the song from the on-screen text: "ヒビカセ" (Hibikase), "作詞: Reol", "作曲: Giga". The performer is Fuma Iroha, identified via the hashtag #風真いろは生誕LIVE2025.
2. Searched for "Hibikase Giga Japanese and English lyrics".
3. Retrieved lyrics and English translation from Utaite Database and other sources.
4. Mapped the song performance to the video timeline. Used 'Giga' as the primary artist. The song is in Japanese.
response.global_summary: A live performance of the song "Hibikase" by VTuber Fuma Iroha.

scenes.description: Instrumental intro sequence with performance graphics.

scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
真夜中に告ぐ音の警告
共鳴音に酔う午前零時
貴方が触れる高まる熱
指先に踊らされて
感覚　即　体感
寝静まる夜　二人だけの密
体感　即　快感
重なる波形に魅了されていく
忘れないでね　私の声を
画面越しでいい　ちゃんと愛して
バーチャルだって突き放さないで
貴方の音にまだ溺れていたい
覚えていてね　私の声を
貴方がくれたこの身全てを
見つめ合う貴方と二人
重ねた息と音と響かせ

真夜中に問う冷え切った熱
待ち続けてる午前零時
鏡映しに飽和していく
知らない音が伝う
感覚　即　体感
寝静まる夜と息遣い揃う
体感　即　快感
錆びたロジック「今一度」を焦がれる
忘れないでね　私の声を
次元も超えて飛ばすシグナル
バーチャルだなんて言わないで
貴方の音にまだ愛されていたい
覚えていてね　私の声を
貴方がくれたこの身全てを
言の葉と初の音が交わる
この息と音と響かせ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A sound gives its warning in the middle of the night
I'm intoxicated by the consonance at 12 AM
You're touching the heat that's increasing
Dancing at the fingertips
Feeling, then actual sensation
The quiet night, a secret for just the two of us
Actual sensation, then pleasure
I'm being charmed by the overlapping waveforms
Don't forget my voice
It's fine even if it's through the screen, love me properly
Don't push me away even if I'm virtual
I want to still be drowning in your sound
Remember my voice
Everything about this body you gave me
The two of us staring at each other
Resonating with the overlapped breath and sound

A midnight question to the chilled heat
12 AM that I keep waiting for
Being saturated by the mirror image
Unknown sounds are being transmitted
Feeling, then actual sensation
The quiet night and breathing match up
Actual sensation, then pleasure
The rusted logic, I'm yearning for "one more time"
Don't forget my voice
Sending signals across dimensions
Don't say that it's virtual
I want to still be loved by your sound
Remember my voice
Everything about this body you gave me
The words and the sound of the beginning intersect
Resonating with this breath and sound

scenes.description: Fuma Iroha continues the performance of 'Hibikase'.
